programme.title: Nightmare Next Door
programme.desc: When Michael Severance goes AWOL, the community of San Angelo rallies around his new bride. There could be something more sinister behind his disappearance.

programme.title: Calls From the Inside
programme.desc: When a ranch hand is found dead in a river outside of Salt Lake City, investigators across two states must work together to catch the killer; searching for the truth uncovers a trail of fraud, deception and adultery that shocks a small town Nevada.

programme.title: Calls From the Inside
programme.desc: It's an iconic line in any crime story -- when a suspect is arrested, they get one call. This gripping true crime series uses jailhouse phone calls to frame the narrative of murder investigations steeped in mystery.

programme.title: Calls From the Inside
programme.desc: An unknown killer tortures and murders a couple in January 2011. Then DNA links an unexpected suspect to the crime, and investigators must rely on recorded jailhouse phone calls to gather solid evidence and bring the culprit to justice.

programme.title: A Killer's Mistake
programme.desc: In Louisiana, 23 young men are found dead over a nine-year period. Investigators search for the Bayou Strangler but a break in the case comes only after a key error by the killer.

programme.desc: Ym mhennod un o'r gyfres garu newydd, Mae Elin Fflur yn croesawu 8 unigolyn sengl i'r Chalet yn yr Alpau i ffeindio cariad. 8 singletons looking for love arrive in the magical French Alps.

programme.title: Bwyd Epic Chris
programme.desc: This time Chris goes with his friends for an epic weekend to a small cottage in the middle of a forest in Betws y Coed. He will be searching for treasures in the woods to make a mushroom-filled meal, and will prepare a steak for the boys to relieve their hangover in the morning! But the biggest challenge will be to cook a spit-roast pig powered by the river's water. Epic!

programme.title: Y Pitws Bychain
programme.desc: Mae'r Wee Littles yn deulu bach yn eu harddegau o bedwar a allai fod o dan eich trwyn, a fyddech chi byth yn eu gweld. The Wee Littles are a teensy, tiny family that could be right under your nose.

programme.title: Ein Byd Bach Ni
programme.desc: Byddwn yn dysgu am sut mae robotiaid yn gweithio. Teithiwn i wledydd pell fel Siapan, un o'r gwledydd sy'n creu nifer fawr o robotiaid. We learn how robots work and travel to Japan.

programme.title: Tomos a'i Ffrindiau
programme.desc: The adventures of Thomas the tank engine and friends.

programme.title: Dal Dy Ddannedd
programme.desc: Teams play a series of candyland themed games in order to collect as many clean teeth as possible and win the Dani Dant Trophy.

programme.title: Sam Tân
programme.desc: Mae Meic a Norman yn cystadlu am gynulleidfa i'w sioeau. Mae pethe'n gwaethygu pan mae arwyddbost Meic yn cynnau ac yn anelu am lori danwydd enfawr. Mike and Norman compete for an audience.

programme.title: Blwi
programme.desc: At school, Bluey and friends throw themselves into various games. Teacher Calypso keeps them on track with a wise word and a song, all except the mysterious Pretzel.

programme.title: Blero Yn Mynd I Ocido
programme.desc: Beth sy'n digwydd ym myd Blero heddiw? What's happening in Blero's world today?

programme.title: Kim a Cêt a Twrch
programme.desc: Ymunwch â Kim a Cêt ar antur hudolus sy'n llawn dawns a cherddoriaeth wrth iddyn nhw chwilio am Twrch yn y goedwig. Join Kim & Cêt as they search for the character Twrch in the forest.

programme.title: Sion Y Chef
programme.desc: Izzy misses her mum so Magi takes her out for the day to cheer her up while Siôn offers to do Magi's chores on the farm. But he soon finds it's not that easy.

programme.title: Newyffion
programme.desc: Ar y Newffion heddiw, mae cennin yn bwysig iawn i Gymru, ond beth mae'r statws PGI newydd yn ei olygu? Today: what does the new PGI status mean for leeks, about what about light pollution?

programme.title: Twm Twrch
programme.desc: An anthropomorphic mole lives in MoleTown with his friends and other animals.

programme.title: Annibendod
programme.desc: Anni and her hamster side-kick Bochau go through a series of chaotic adventures.

programme.title: Joni Jet
programme.desc: Pre-School Animation.

programme.title: Penblwyddi Cyw
programme.desc: Cyfle i edrych 'nôl dros rai o gyfarchion pen-blwydd yr wythnos. A look back at some of this week's birthday greetings.

programme.title: Gwyl
programme.desc: Lowri Morgan travels to Oaxaca for the extraordinary Mexican festival of The Day of the Dead, where skeletons, sugar skulls and a blood-coloured sauce all speak of the ancient Aztec origins of the festival.

programme.title: Gwesty Aduniad
programme.desc: Aduniad dau frawd wedi eu magu yng nghartef plant Bontnewydd wedi 30+ ml ar wahan. Ben and Cadi and their mothers, Eleri and Jos reunite after time together in the special care unit for babies.

programme.title: Garddio A Mwy
programme.desc: Cyfres Garddio yngnghwmniMeinir Gwilym, Sioned Edwards ac Adam Jones. Flowers, veg and all life's good stuff, with the team.

programme.title: Dechrau Canu Dechrau Canmol
programme.desc: I nodi Pythefnos Maethu 2026, byddwn yn tynnu sylw at y gwaith hanfodol sy'n cael eu gwneud gan ofalwyr. To mark Fostering Fortnight, we'll highlight the vital work carried out by carers.

programme.title: Y Deis
programme.desc: Gêm gwis gwreiddiol. Yn cystadlu heno mae timau o Hwlffordd/Aberporth, Porthmadog/Bryncir a Phontypridd/Pontyclun. A quiz show that combines knowledge, strategy and a little bit of luck.

programme.title: Y Sioe Fwyd
programme.desc: Presenter Ifan Jones Evans and chef Hywel Griffith are joined by musician Alys Williams.

programme.title: Cynefin
programme.desc: Cyfle i fynd ar drywydd rhai o straeon difyr a chudd gwahanol rannau o Gymru. Visiting different areas of Wales and featuring quirky and lesser-known local stories.

programme.title: Dylan Ar Daith
programme.desc: The story of Margaret Jones of Rhosllannerchrugog who lived on five continents and became famous as an author and a lecturer.

programme.title: Y Castell
programme.desc: Jon Gower traces the history of the Castle - here in Wales and across Europe. How were these huge, impregnable fortresses constructed centuries ago, without the aid of modern technology? It's a thrilling story, and Wales plays a central part.

programme.title: Nol o'r Dibyn gyda Iolo Williams
programme.desc: Yn y bennod hon, edrychwn ar nifer o enghreifftiau o ymdrechion cadwraeth, gan gynnwys: gynefinoedd trefol dyfrgwn a'r drudwy yng Nghymru. We look at conservationists across Europe.

programme.title: Ffermio
programme.desc: Cyfres sy'n edrych ar y byd amaeth, yn cynnwys rai o bynciau llosg y diwydiant. A series exploring the world of agriculture across Wales.

programme.title: Sgwrs Dan y Lloer
programme.desc: Yn y rhifyn Nadolig arbennig yma fe fydd Elin Fflur yn croesi'r Iwerydd i 'sgwrsio dan y lloer' gyda un o sêr mwya' Hollywood - Matthew Rhys. Special Christmas issue with star Matthew Rhys.

programme.title: Newyddion S4C a'r Tywydd

programme.title: Dechrau Canu Dechrau Canmol
programme.desc: Cyfres o ganu mawl ac addoli, a chyfle i gwrdd ag amryw bobl ddiddorol yng Nghymru. Series with hymn singing and worship, and a chance to meet various interesting people in Wales.

programme.title: Am Dro!
programme.desc: Gwennan, Bowen, Mark a Heulwen sy'n mynd â ni 'Am Dro' y tro hwn. Gwennan, Bowen, Mark and Heulwen lead the walks on 'Am Dro' this week.

programme.title: Marw Gyda Kris
programme.desc: Kris Hughes sy'n teithio'r byd i weld sut ma eraill yn delio â marwolaeth. Oes ffyrdd gwell o alaru? Mortician Kris Hughes travels the world looking at different ways of dealing with death.

programme.title: Y Stwidio Greffau
programme.desc: Bob wythnos, bydd tri crefftwr dawnus yn cystadlu â'i gilydd er mwyn ennill y fraint o arddangos eu gwaith i'r cyhoedd ar ran mudiadau mwyaf pwysig Cymru. Three talented craftsmen compete to win a prestigious opportunity to showcase their work.

programme.title: Sain Ffagan
programme.desc: Mae hi'n ddiwrnod prysura'r flwyddyn wrth i ddegau o filoedd o ymwelwyr gyrraedd i fwynhau'r wyl fwyd. It's food festival time and the 100-year-old slates on the Vulcan hotel need replacing.

programme.title: Classic Albums
programme.sub-title: Queen: A Night at the Opera
programme.desc: The fourth Queen album, `A Night at the Opera', released in late 1975, is a mix of hard rock, pop, opera, music hall camp and traditional folk, utilising multi-layered guitars, crunching riffs, and vocal harmonies.

programme.title: Painting Birds with Jim and Nancy Moir
programme.desc: Jim and Nancy visit the East Yorkshire coast to paint the splendid gannet. They are joined by artists Colin and Jess Self, as well as Jim's mum Audrey.

programme.title: Mozart: Così fan tutte
programme.desc: Written at the height of his musical prowess, witness a 2021 production of Mozart's opera 'Così fan tutte' that pays tribute to the wit and skill of one of the world's finest composers.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: The rich and beautiful Lady Turton flaunts her lovers in front of her husband, but the disapproving butler sees the perfect chance for revenge.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A young couple's lives are strangely altered when the wife becomes obsessed with a stray cat.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A tourist on a transatlantic liner stakes his all on one last, desperate gamble.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A neurotic woman with a fear of not being punctual is tormented by her husband on a troubled trip to America.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: A syndicated advice columnist receives a letter from an old busybody which leads the journalist to irrationality and murder.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: An unfaithful wife gets more than she bargained for when she decides to leave both her husband and her lover.

programme.title: Peter O'Toole: Along the Sky Road to Aqaba
programme.desc: Feature documentary reflecting on Peter O'Toole's towering theatrical legacy. Includes interviews with Sir Anthony Hopkins, Sir Derek Jacobi and Stephen Fry.

programme.title: Discovering Film
programme.desc: Movie experts reflect on the career of Dirk Bogarde, the great English actor known for his complex roles in the dark films `Victim, Death in Venice and The Night Porter'.

programme.title: Classic Movies: The Story Of
programme.desc: 'Mulholland Drive', a look at David Lynch's 2001 mystery thriller, defined by the shifting relationship between Betty and Rita.

programme.title: Iconic Women of Country
programme.desc: Country artists Kathy Mattea, Trisha Yearwood, Wynonna Judd and more pay tribute to the female artists who inspired them.

programme.title: Legends In Concert: Johnny Cash
programme.desc: Fantastic collection of recordings from Johnny Cash's early years, including nostalgic performances of I Got Stripes, Don't Take Your Guns To Town and Five Feet High And Rising.

programme.title: Bowie: The Man Who Changed the World
programme.desc: A look at David Bowie's enormous influence on music, art and culture via interviews with some of the people who knew him best.

programme.title: David Bowie: Serious Moonlight Tour
programme.desc: The singer's 1983 Vancouver performance; includes "China Girl," "Heroes."

programme.title: Becoming Madonna
programme.desc: Madonna's coming-of-age story is one of the greatest in entertainment history. This documentary film traces her transformation from insecure outsider to controversial star.

programme.title: Women Who Rock
programme.desc: The '70s brought new sounds and icons like Nancy Wilson of Heart and Joan Jett and hard rockers like Wilson and Debbie Harry.

programme.title: Women Who Rock
programme.desc: The '70s brought new sounds and icons like Nancy Wilson of Heart and Joan Jett and hard rockers like Wilson and Debbie Harry.

programme.title: The Great Songwriters
programme.sub-title: Ian McCulloch / Echo And The Bunnymen
programme.desc: Ian McCulloch / Echo and the Bunnymen: The Echo and the Bunnymen frontman talks songwriting and his life in music, and performs beloved tracks including The Killing Moon.

programme.title: High Plains Drifter
programme.desc: A mysterious stranger rides into a small frontier town in the American southwest, provoked into a gunfight in which he kills three men, and then begged by the townsfolk to become sheriff. The residents are terrified of the gunslinger but live in greater fear of a gang which intends to wipe out the whole town.

programme.title: Rumble in the Bronx
programme.desc: A Hong Kong cop on holiday in New York puts his martial arts skills to good use when he helps out a friend whose shop is targeted by a vicious street gang. Martial arts hero Jackie Chan, as always, does all his own stunts.

programme.title: Vendetta
programme.desc: When his daughter is brutally murdered and legal justice looks unlikely, William Duncan takes the law into his own hands, setting out on a quest for retribution.

programme.title: Safe House
programme.desc: Six government agents become trapped inside a high-security safe house after a terrorist attack in downtown Los Angeles. They soon realise they must survive not just the enemy outside, but the potential traitor among them.

programme.title: Gladiator II
programme.desc: Lucius must enter the Colosseum after the powerful emperors of Rome conquer his home. With rage in his heart and the future of the empire at stake, he looks to the past to find the strength and honour needed to return the glory of Rome to its people.

programme.title: Bullet Train
programme.desc: Five assassins find themselves on a fast moving bullet train from Tokyo to Morioka with only a few stops in between. They discover their missions are not unrelated to each other.

programme.title: Snakes on a Plane
programme.desc: An FBI agent must contend with a swarm of deadly serpents that have been released aboard an airliner to kill the witness he is escorting to trial.

Stylish historical epic retelling the fierce battle at Thermopylae in 481BC. The Spartan king, Leonidas, and his tiny army of 300 followers provided inspiration for the whole of Greece as they fought the massed ranks of the Persian army whose commander, King Xerxes, had up to a million warriors at his disposal.

programme.title: Fuze
programme.desc: London undergoes a citywide evacuation when a World War II bomb is unearthed at a construction site. Amid the escalating chaos, a daring criminal operation is set in motion -- one that uses the evacuation as a cover for a meticulously planned heist.

programme.title: Spider-Man: No Way Home
programme.desc: Spider-Man's identity is revealed to everyone, and he can no longer separate his normal life from his superhero life. When he asks Doctor Strange for help, it forces him to discover what it means to be him.

programme.title: Venom: The Last Dance
programme.desc: Eddie Brock and Venom must make a devastating decision as they're pursued by a mysterious military man and alien monsters from Venom's home world.

programme.title: Rumble in the Bronx
programme.desc: A Hong Kong cop on holiday in New York puts his martial arts skills to good use when he helps out a friend whose shop is targeted by a vicious street gang. Martial arts hero Jackie Chan, as always, does all his own stunts.

programme.title: Safe House
programme.desc: Six government agents become trapped inside a high-security safe house after a terrorist attack in downtown Los Angeles. They soon realise they must survive not just the enemy outside, but the potential traitor among them.

programme.title: The Warriors
programme.desc: Wrongly accused of assassinating top gang leader Cyrus at a rally, Coney Islanders The Warriors have to fight their way home over the course of one long, violent night.

programme.title: The Warriors
programme.desc: Wrongly accused of assassinating top gang leader Cyrus at a rally, Coney Islanders The Warriors have to fight their way home over the course of one long, violent night.

programme.title: Am I OK?
programme.desc: When Lucy realises that she's never been attracted to men, her lifelong friend Jane helps her navigate coming out in her 30s.

programme.title: Fords On Water
programme.desc: Two young men - one white and one black - find themselves thrown together by circumstance and decide to escape London and take off to the north in a stolen car.

programme.title: Sometimes I Think About Dying
programme.desc: A lonely and socially awkward woman tries to make a connection with a friendly new co-worker who takes her out on a date.

programme.title: Book of Love
programme.desc: Sparks fly between an uptight English writer and a Spanish translator who rewrote his failed book into an erotic novel.

programme.title: Hope Springs
programme.desc: A woman drags her skeptical husband to a renowned counsellor's marriage retreat to try to put the spark back in their relationship.

programme.title: The Naked Gun 2 1/2: The Smell of Fear
programme.desc: Lt Frank Debrin uncovers a plot by the polluting energy giants to de-rail ecological plans that could render their products redundant. They're led by the evil Quentin Hapsburg who, to make matters worse, is romancing Frank's ex, Jane Spencer.

programme.title: The Wedding Singer
programme.desc: When one-time rock hopeful Robbie is jilted at the altar, he vents his bitterness in song, even when singing at other people's weddings. Only true love can redeem the broken hearted songster but fortunately, he's about to meet a woman who will spin him right round (like a record).

programme.title: Anchorman 2: The Legend Continues
programme.desc: Ron Burgundy tries to stay classy when he and his team take New York and the nation's first 24-hour global cable news network by storm.

programme.title: Instant Family
programme.desc: When Pete and Ellie decide to start a family, they stumble into the world of foster care adoption. They hope to take in one small child, but when they meet three siblings, including a rebellious 15-year-old girl, they find themselves speeding from zero to three kids overnight. Now, Pete and Ellie must try to learn the ropes of instant parenthood in the hope of becoming a family.

programme.title: The Naked Gun 33 1/3: The Final Insult
programme.desc: Clueless cop Frank Drebin is hauled out of retirement to save the Oscars ceremony from mad bombers. Anna Nicole Smith provides support in this comic sequel.

programme.title: The Man With Two Brains
programme.desc: Zany horror spoof about a brilliant brain surgeon who falls in love with a female brain stored in a jar. The brain is part of an impressive collection held by a colleague in Austria and, upon learning of his wife's infidelity, the surgeon allows himself to be charmed. Communicating telepathically with one of the specimens in the laboratory, he falls in love - but needs a body to put it in.

programme.title: Bridget Jones: The Edge of Reason
programme.desc: Bridget's brand new relationship with Darcy has taken a plummet due to her jealousy of his workmate. Having previously left the publishing house she worked for to avoid her boss, Daniel, with whom she had an unsuccessful romance, she finds him along for the ride on her new job, which takes her to Thailand, and almost into his arms.

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Baby
programme.desc: Befuddled mom-to-be Bridget Jones must figure out which of the two men in her life is the father of her child.

programme.title: Babes
programme.desc: Pregnant from a one-night-stand, Eden leans on her best friend and mother of two, Dawn, to guide her through gestation and beyond.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview
programme.desc: Previews of the great films now playing on Sky Cinema plus other highlights showing on Sky.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview
programme.desc: Previews of the great films now playing on Sky Cinema plus other highlights showing on Sky.

programme.title: The Friend
programme.desc: Iris finds her comfortable New York City life thrown into disarray after her closest friend and mentor bequeaths her a Great Dane named Apollo. Yet as Iris finds herself unexpectedly bonding with Apollo, she begins to come to terms with her past.

programme.title: Cicada
programme.desc: Ben, a young bisexual man, comes out to the world and develops an intense relationship with Sam, a closeted man struggling with deep wounds of his own. As summer progresses and their intimacy grows, secrets from the past come to light.

programme.title: The Cut
programme.desc: Given one last shot at glory, a former boxing champion has just six days to make weight for a title fight. His obsession soon leaves him at the mercy of a notorious trainer who takes every last ounce from his mind, body and soul.

programme.title: Cookster: The Darkest Days
programme.desc: A dyslexic teen misunderstood by his family and desperate for respect, becomes a drug dealer struggling with addiction and debt while a rival threatens to destroy his world, driving him apart from the woman he loves.

programme.title: I Used to Be Funny
programme.desc: Comedian Sam struggles with PTSD, and considers joining the search for a missing teenage girl.

programme.title: A Mistake
programme.desc: A surgeon allows her young colleague to take charge during a surgery. When a mistake occurs, the surgeon finds herself in a difficult situation.

programme.title: Jackie
programme.desc: The days leading up to the tragedy of President John F. Kennedy's assassination and its immediate aftermath are chronicled as they were experienced by the First Lady, wife of the charismatic president and mother of two small children.

programme.title: Footloose
programme.desc: Chicago teen Ren and his family move to the small midwestern town of Bomont, where rock music has been banned.

programme.title: Lost in Translation
programme.desc: In Tokyo shooting a whisky commercial, middle-aged actor Bob Harris becomes attracted to Charlotte, the young wife of a celebrity photographer. Together they ride out their boredom of hotel life and their bewilderment of the city.

programme.title: An Officer and a Gentleman
programme.desc: At a tough training school for American navy pilots, one of the new intake falls foul of the hard-as-nails drill sergeant, but takes it on the chin, and finds the additional strength to help a fellow student who is feeling the pressure.

programme.title: Dunkirk
programme.desc: Germany advances into France, trapping Allied troops on the beaches of Dunkirk. Under air and ground cover from British and French forces, troops are slowly and methodically evacuated from the beach using every vessel that can be found.

programme.title: Night Call
programme.desc: After responding to an emergency call from a mysterious woman, a young locksmith gets unwittingly caught in the crosshairs of a ruthless mob boss.

programme.title: I Used to Be Funny
programme.desc: Comedian Sam struggles with PTSD, and considers joining the search for a missing teenage girl.

programme.title: Drift
programme.desc: Young Liberian refugee Jacqueline barely escapes her war-torn country to settle on a Greek island. Her daily struggle for survival keeps terrible memories at bay, and she becomes close to an American tour guide.

programme.title: Drift

programme.title: Friend or Foe
programme.desc: WWII evacuee David hates the Germans, but now his life has been saved by one. What is the right thing to do, tell the Army or offer his help?

programme.title: Peter Pan
programme.desc: In stifling Edwardian London, Wendy Darling mesmerises her brothers every night with bedtime tales of swordplay, swashbuckling and the fearsome Captain Hook. However, the children become the heroes of an even greater story, when Peter Pan flies into their nursery one night and leads them over moonlit rooftops through a galaxy of stars and to the lush jungles of Neverland.

programme.title: Breaking Point

programme.title: Transformers One
programme.desc: Brothers-in-arms Orion Pax and D-16 become sworn enemies Optimus Prime and Megatron.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Out of the Shadows

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog 3

programme.title: Charlotte's Web
programme.desc: After learning that a young pig's days are numbered, a literate spider weaves an elaborate plan to save her friend from the butcher's block.

programme.title: The Ant Bully
programme.desc: This is the story of a ten-year-old boy named Lucas Nickle, who has just moved to a new neighbourhood, has no friends, and is the target for the local bully and his gang. His parents are leaving for a honeymoon in Puerto Vallarta, so they are too busy to attend to his problems. His sister is distracted by her cellular phone, and the grandmother is obsessed with UFOs and aliens.

programme.title: Lemony Snicket's A Series of Unfortunate Events
programme.desc: Three orphans are sent to live with their uncle Count Olaf, but he only wants their family fortune. What follows is a battle of wits.

programme.title: The LEGO Movie

programme.title: The Portable Door

programme.title: Mouse Hunt
programme.desc: Slapstick tale which follows the misfortunes of two hard-up brothers whose plans to renovate and sell a valuable building are jeopardised by a rogue mouse. The brothers soon find themselves pulling out all the stops in order to evict their tiny resident.

programme.title: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Following the adventures of Yang who is a successor in to a long line of Avatars. He has to put aside his childhood in order to stop he Fire Nation from enslaving the Water, Earth and Air nations.

programme.title: The Hunt for Red October

programme.title: Shenandoah

programme.title: Jerry Maguire
programme.desc: A sports agent who makes the mistake of saying what he believes, finds himself sacked and abandoned by all his clients apart from small time footballer Rod Tidwell. Maguire's personal life starts to fall apart as he's torn between love and money in Cameron Crowe's metaphor on Americans' need for success and money.

programme.title: The Long Kiss Goodnight
programme.desc: An amnesiac schoolteacher discovers she was formerly a government assassin when she hires a low-rent private eye to help fill the gaps in her memory. Together, they go on the run in a race against the clock to stop her former taskmasters from putting a heinous plan into action, before they can silence her for good.

programme.title: Men in Black

programme.title: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: Supernatural comedy about three New York parapsychology professors who decide to set up a ghost-catching agency. Soon a storm of malevolent spirits threatens to destroy the city, and the mysterious contents of a woman's fridge suggest a paranormal Armageddon.

programme.title: Planes, Trains and Automobiles
programme.desc: Fastidious businessman Neal Page and slobbish shower-curtain salesman Del Griffith are the reluctant odd couple trying to get home from New York to Chicago to be with their families at Thanksgiving whose thwarted travel plans keep throwing them together in.

programme.title: A League of Their Own

programme.title: You've Got Mail
programme.desc: Two rival bookstore owners are unaware that they are conducting a secret romance with each other on the Internet. When they discover the truth, they must prevent their business rivalry from interfering with their growing personal intimacy.

programme.title: Dogtown and Z-Boys
programme.desc: In mid-70s America, skateboarding was a fad in danger of dying out, until a small group of surfers in Santa Monica began moving to extremes in both lifestyle and techniques, using their skills in empty swimming pools and the streets to create a new form of skateboarding. Director Stacy Peralta, who was one of the group, weaves home footage of their early days with interviews with those still in the scene.

programme.title: Discovering Film
programme.desc: An intimate portrait of Ronald Colman, the English actor who won an Academy Award for his role as a troubled thespian in the 1947 film noir A Double Life.

programme.title: Discovering Film
programme.desc: An eye-opening look at the life and career of four-time Academy Award nominee Claude Rains, the English actor who appeared in Casablanca and Lawrence of Arabia.

programme.title: Discovering Film
programme.desc: A portrait of Janet Leigh, the American actress, singer, dancer and author who is best remembered for her Golden Globe-winning performance in Psycho.

programme.title: The Directors
programme.desc: A look into the life and career of the Hollywood director, whose portfolio is filled to the brim with classics like Jaws and Indiana Jones.

programme.title: Sergio Leone: The Italian Who Invented America
programme.desc: An homage to Italian film director Sergio Leone, credited as the pioneer of the Spaghetti Western subgenre. Features interviews with Quentin Tarantino, Robert De Niro and Clint Eastwood.

programme.title: Missile From The East
programme.desc: The true story of Ernst Degner, a champion East German motorcycle racer who risked his life defecting to West Germany during the Swedish Grand Prix in 1961.

programme.title: I'm Chevy Chase and you're not
I Am Richard Pryor
programme.desc: Richard Pryor drew the line between comedy and tragedy as thin as possible, volatile yet vulnerable, crass but sensitive, streetwise and cocky, Pryor did not simply tell stories, he brought them to vivid life.

programme.title: My Icon
programme.desc: In the next episode of this special series, England Netball star Kadeen Corbin discusses the individuals that have inspired her during her life and career.

programme.title: The Salt Path Scandal
programme.desc: Follow journalist Chloe Hadjimatheou as a tip sparks a probing look into Raynor Winn's beloved memoir, uncovering claims and evidence that challenge The Salt Path's truth.

programme.title: My Icon
programme.desc: British tennis star Heather Watson discusses the individuals who have inspired her over the course of her life.

programme.title: Going Clear: Scientology & the Prison of Belief
programme.desc: Former Scientologists talk about their experiences and why exactly they left the controversial religion.

programme.title: Chernobyl: The Lost Tapes
programme.desc: The story of Chernobyl told through a newly discovered hoard of dramatic footage filmed at the nuclear plant during the disaster and newly-recorded, deeply personal interviews of those who were there.

programme.title: Bruno V Tyson
programme.desc: This historic feature length film charts the sensational path of two of the world's most iconic black sportsmen, capped off with a reunion between the two old foes.

programme.title: Wirecard: A Billion Euro Lie
programme.desc: Lifting the lid on the scandal that rocked the financial sector across the globe: the rise and billion-dollar fall of financial payment firm Wirecard.

programme.title: Great Photo, Lovely Life
programme.desc: Photojournalist Amanda Mustard turns her investigative lens on sexual abuse committed by her grandfather, beginning a personal journey in pursuit of the truth and reconciliation for her family.

programme.title: Canadian Pickers

programme.title: Ancient Aliens

programme.title: Digging Up Britain's Past
programme.desc: A look at how the exploits of a group of historic bishops seemingly echo fantasy lore.

programme.title: Digging Up Britain's Past
programme.desc: Centuries ago, canals were the liquid highways of Britain, and their arrival kickstarted the Industrial Revolution. The team search for artefacts from the country's first superhighway - the Bridgewater Canal, completed in 1761.

programme.desc: Investigating mysteries, including the promised turmoil for anyone who disturbed the pharaohs' eternal rest, a devilish figure at the Mississippi crossroads, and allegedly cursed dark tablets of ancient lead.

programme.title: Cursed Histories

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo

programme.title: Aussie Snake Wranglers: Deadly Pursuit

Stu visits a farm with an eastern brown snake trapped in a fence and Liv and Stu protect a dog from a roaming red belly black snake. Meanwhile, Mick plays a prickly game of hide and seek with a stubborn coastal carpet python.

programme.title: Aussie Snake Wranglers: Deadly Pursuit
programme.desc: Follows a group of professional snake catchers on Queensland's Sunshine Coast as they go head-to-head with some of the planet's deadliest snakes.

programme.title: Secret Life of the Kangaroo

programme.title: Secret Life of the Kangaroo
programme.desc: Aggressive predators, extreme weather and lively joeys can make the task of bringing up baby challenging for mother kangaroos.

programme.title: Secret Life of the Kangaroo
programme.desc: Male kangaroos, also known as bucks, face both risk and reward in their drive to perpetuate their species.

programme.desc: David Attenborough uses fossil evidence and CGI to reveal how mammals developed from tiny forest dwellers to become the dominant life form on the planet.

programme.title: Boss Shark

programme.title: Ocean Parks
programme.desc: These Parks are monitored by Ocean advocates dedicated to maintaining the shark feeding grounds, turtle populations, and marine spawning grounds that line this incredible reef system.

programme.title: Cub Camp
programme.desc: Spy on the summer cubs as they learn to climb trees and forage for food in preparation for their release into the wild. Get surprised by a set of new arrivals, observe the annual pre-hibernation eating binge, and enjoy a bear-friendly Thanksgiving.

programme.title: Cub Camp
programme.desc: Prepare for the summer cubs' release with Roger, then meet Ace and Little Blueberry, two newbies with serious health issues who will have to stay over the winter with the Z cubs. Later, celebrate as six healthy, happy bears embark on their new life.

programme.title: City Wildlife Rescue
programme.desc: It is spring time and the centre is overwhelmed by the amount of babies coming through the doors. The vets fawn over the cutest baby possum.

programme.title: City Wildlife Rescue
programme.desc: The rehab team check on a group of baby rabbits after surviving a nasty dog attack. They have to play mum until they are ready to go back into the wild.

programme.title: City Wildlife Rescue
programme.desc: The rescue team want to assess an injured young coopers hawk that fell into a pool. However, they must find him first.

programme.title: City Wildlife Rescue
programme.desc: The Toronto Wildlife Centre's rescue team is called to save a raccoon trapped in a peanut butter jar on a hot summer's day.

programme.title: Into the Wild India
programme.desc: Rajan is the powerful alpha male who sits at the head of an unusually large troop. He has done well to sustain such a big group, but the future doesn't look so bright. There are more mouths to feed, and yet his jungle home is shrinking.

programme.title: Into the Wild India
programme.desc: Nestled on the edge of the ancient city of Jodhpur, the luxurious Temple Gardens are home to a huge troop of Hanuman langurs, who enjoy a peaceful life of bounty. Yet, the troop has a strict hierarchy.

programme.title: Nature
programme.desc: Two families explore the evolutionary journey of woodpeckers and the role they play in each ecosystem that they inhabit.

programme.title: Deep Dive North America
programme.desc: Join Lizzie on her most perilous Atlantic adventure yet, free diving with bull sharks. Explore otherworldly Gulf Coast swamps teeming with hungry alligators and crafty snapping turtles. Discover tiny but mighty beach mice that strengthen sand dunes.

programme.title: Deep Dive North America
programme.desc: Bundle up as Lizzie heads north to tag sharks and witness first-hand the slow, sobering disappearance of sea ice. Do time in bear jail with polar bears who are caught raiding a town for food after their icy hunting grounds diminish.

programme.title: Predators
programme.desc: In the remote mountains of Patagonia, a mother puma has just six months to teach her cubs how to survive in an increasingly competitive world.

programme.title: Predators
programme.desc: In Zimbabwe, an African wild dog pack find themselves outnumbered by lions and hyenas. Their pups must learn quickly if the pack is to survive.

programme.title: Aussie Snake Wranglers: Deadly Pursuit
programme.desc: Jess and Dan catch a keelback snake before it spreads its foul smell. It's a battle of wills as Mick and Adele tackle a python in a drain. And Stu discovers a dangerous snake hiding in the wall of a university.

programme.title: Aussie Snake Wranglers: Deadly Pursuit
programme.desc: Mick and Adele remove two mating eastern brown snakes from a nursing home. Stu and Liv catch a tree snake in the warehouse, while Jess and Dan track down a dangerous intruder.

programme.title: David Attenborough's First Life
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough journeys across the globe to discover how the earliest animals developed on our planet. Attenborough meets expert fossil hunters, and sees on-site some of the most remarkable finds that have transformed our understanding of the first animal life forms, including the first set of eyes and teeth and the first predators and parasites.

programme.title: David Attenborough's First Life
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough's journey continues in Canada's Rocky Mountains, where fossils document an explosion in animal diversity never seen before or since. Travelling on to North Africa, the rainforests of Australia and the east coast of Scotland, Attenborough discovers how animals evolved to conquer not only the oceans but also the land and air.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural History Museum Alive
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough brings the wonders of the Natural History Museum's astonishing collection to life. During a magical, after-hours journey, he brings you closer than ever before to the extraordinary creatures that once roamed our planet.

programme.title: Land of the Far North
programme.desc: Despite the darkness and cold at the Arctic Circle, plants and animals manage to survive.

programme.title: Rewilding
programme.desc: The European bison once roamed most of the old world, but were hunted to extinction by the early twentieth century. Only by ambitious rewilding undertakings is it possible to see these fascinating animals in their natural habitats again.

programme.title: Rewilding
programme.desc: The Steinhuder Meer in the heart of northern Germany is a biodiversity hotspot. The richly textured landscape is the ideal outdoor laboratory for biologists who operate Germany's significant reintroduction of wildlife.

programme.title: Rewilding

programme.title: Novak Djokovic's Top 10
programme.sub-title: 2007 Canadian Open Final: Novak Djokovic v Roger Federer
programme.desc: At the 2007 Canadian Open, Novak Djokovic defeated the world's top three players in successive matches en route to his second Masters title, including victory in the final over Federer.

programme.title: Novak Djokovic's Top 10
programme.sub-title: 2009 Paris Masters Final: Novak Djokovic v Gael Monfils
programme.desc: In one of the most dramatic finals Bercy has ever seen, Novak Djokovic and Gael Monfils went toe to toe in a tightly fought, three-set battle for the 2009 Rolex Paris Masters title.

programme.title: Novak Djokovic's Top 10
programme.sub-title: 2011 Madrid Open Final: Novak Djokovic v Rafael Nadal
programme.desc: In the 2011 Madrid Open final at the Caja Magica, Novak Djokovic inflicted the first clay-court defeat on Rafael Nadal in nearly two years to claim his fifth title of the year.

programme.title: Novak Djokovic's Top 10
programme.sub-title: 2011 US Open Final: Novak Djokovic v Rafael Nadal
programme.desc: During a year in which Novak Djokovic dominated Rafael Nadal, one of the Serb's most high-profile victories over the legendary Spaniard came in the final of the 2011 US Open.

programme.title: Novak Djokovic's Top 10
programme.sub-title: 2012 Shanghai Masters Final: Novak Djokovic v Andy Murray
programme.desc: After saving five championship points, Novak Djokovic roared back to dethrone the two-time reigning Shanghai Masters champion Andy Murray in an epic, three-set 2012 thriller.

programme.title: Novak Djokovic's Top 10
programme.sub-title: 2012 ATP Finals Final: Novak Djokovic v Roger Federer
programme.desc: With the 2012 season-ending title on the line at the O2 Arena, two-time defending champion Roger Federer looked to deny world number one Novak Djokovic a second ATP world title.

programme.title: Novak Djokovic's Top 10
programme.sub-title: 2013 Monte Carlo Masters Final: Novak Djokovic v Rafael Nadal
programme.desc: In the 2013 final of the Monte-Carlo Rolex Masters, Novak Djokovic brought an end to Rafael Nadal's eight-year reign as champion in the Principality.

programme.title: Novak Djokovic's Top 10
programme.sub-title: 2014 Indian Wells Final: Novak Djokovic v Roger Federer
programme.desc: Fighting back to beat the great Roger Federer, a 26-year-old Novak Djokovic clinched his third Indian Wells title in a riveting 2014 final that went all the way to a third-set tie-break.

programme.title: Novak Djokovic's Top 10
programme.sub-title: 2023 Cincinnati Masters Final: Novak Djokovic v Carlos Alcaraz
programme.desc: Out to avenge the five-set Wimbledon final defeat inflicted by the Spaniard, Novak Djokovic finally overcame Carlos Alcaraz in just under four hours in the 2023 Cincinnati final.

programme.title: Novak Djokovic's Top 10
programme.sub-title: 2023 US Open Final: Novak Djokovic v Daniil Medvedev
programme.desc: In a repeat of the 2021 final, the winner on that day, Daniil Medvedev, fought three-time champion Novak Djokovic in the final of the 2023 men's singles at the US Open.

programme.title: Novak Djokovic's Top 10
programme.sub-title: 2025 Geneva Open Final: Novak Djokovic v Hubert Hurkacz
programme.desc: In what was a chance for Novak Djokovic to join Jimmy Connors and Roger Federer in winning a 100th tour-level title, the 38-year-old Serb battled Hubert Hurkacz in the Geneva Open final.

programme.title: Judge Judy

programme.sub-title: Give Me My Prize Money!; Lesbian Marriage Fail
programme.desc: Winners of a pool tournament say they were promised trophies, a banquet, and $600 in cash but were assaulted by the league manager instead. A woman sues her ex-fiancée for money owed for a wedding dress and impound fees.

programme.sub-title: Defective Pug Puppy?!; Salvaged Car Fraud?!

programme.title: Turkey with Simon Reeve

programme.title: Mortimer and Whitehouse: Gone Fishing
programme.desc: While in Norfolk fishing for tench, Bob tries to impress Paul with his childhood fishing rod, and fails. They share nostalgia for their younger years and reveal how they recently came face to face with their own mortality. After a brief respite in a local brewery, they reluctantly camp down in Yurts before fishing again the next day where the elusive Tench seems to evade them until the very last minute.

programme.title: Mortimer and Whitehouse: Gone Fishing
programme.desc: In Hay on Wye, Paul and Bob fish for the mighty barbel. Passing a graveyard they muse about the future and chat to a local vicar about death and their own funerals.To lighten the mood, back in their wooden fishing cabin, Bob promises Paul a very special treat if they are successful in their angling efforts.

programme.title: Mortimer and Whitehouse: Gone Fishing
programme.desc: In the beautiful Monsal Valley, in Derbyshire, Paul teaches Bob how to fly fish for wild Rainbow Trout. While fishing, they discuss their humble beginnings in showbusiness and have a good gossip about their contemporaries. Bob cooks Paul his very personal recipe of `Tuna Melanie' on the river bank and it soon transpires his cooking is a lot more successful than his fishing.

programme.title: Mortimer and Whitehouse: Gone Fishing
programme.desc: While in Norfolk fishing for tench, Bob tries to impress Paul with his childhood fishing rod, and fails. programme.title: Mortimer and Whitehouse: Gone Fishing
programme.desc: Paul fishes at Christchurch's quintessential Bridge Pool in Dorset, hoping to catch sea trout. Bob arrives late but redeems himself by hooking the first fish of the day. After a glorious morning Paul persuades Bob to charter a boat out to sea in search of sea bass. Bob has a history of seasickness and is not keen but eventually they venture out to the Needles where Paul makes an incredible catch. The fish is too big for Bob to handle so they head off to a local restaurant to prepare it.

programme.title: Mortimer and Whitehouse: Gone Fishing
programme.desc: Paul and Bob decide to try and catch a legendary Pike, which is perhaps not the best idea for two men of a certain age with heart problems. In the cosy cottage where they are staying, they invite a consultant cardiologist for dinner to talk about their medical past and their future, gaining tips on how to live the most healthy life possible. Facing the future, they write a eulogy for each other as the sun sets on their final fishing expedition.

programme.desc: Joey meets up with Roxy but her husband is not pleased to see him. Mr Boswell and Lilo Lill are in a watchman's hut when an accident takes place.

programme.title: Bread

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Research into why and how large projects were built, the financial and social costs of their failure, and the consequences for the environment. Experts present plans to make something new from the ruins.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Explores a ground structure in Hull that was reduced to rubble by the planes of Hitler's Luftwaffe, Casa Albero in Italy, the USS Hornet in California, and the tunnels of Sofia in Bulgaria.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Explores an old landmark in Liberia with surprising American origins, the desolate town of Doel in Belgium, a Bolivian ski resort, and a pioneering scientific structure in Cleveland.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Explores the Dew Drop Inn in New Orleans, a music mecca that paid the price for taking on the authorities. Also explores Belgica Fort, a stronghold constructed to guard the most unlikely of treasures.

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Prunella Scales and Timothy West's third canal journey takes them back to their honeymoon destination, Llangollen, in north Wales. They cross from Shropshire, via the Llangollen Canal - one of the most picturesque canal journeys in the world.

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Tim and Pru head to France's Burgundy wine region to visit the Canal du Nivernais. It runs through some of the most picturesque scenery in northern France, passing towns and villages steeped in medieval history.

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Timothy West and Prunella Scales visit the romantic city of Oxford, where they began their courtship many years ago and where they went on their first ever canal trip together.

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Timothy and Prunella explore the most picturesque stretch of the Canal du Midi in the south of France. They visit Beziers; the Malpas Tunnel, the first tunnel in the history of mankind, and taste lamb's brain fritters and a 200-year-old brandy.

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Prunella Scales and Timothy West's third canal journey takes them back to their honeymoon destination, Llangollen, in north Wales. They cross from Shropshire, via the Llangollen Canal - one of the most picturesque canal journeys in the world.

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Tim and Pru head to France's Burgundy wine region to visit the Canal du Nivernais. It runs through some of the most picturesque scenery in northern France, passing towns and villages steeped in medieval history.

programme.title: Wild China
programme.desc: China's heartland is the centre of a 5,000-year-old civilisation and is home to the giant panda, the golden snub-nosed monkey and the golden takin. China faces environmental problems, but the relationship the Chinese have with their environment is deep and extraordinary. We will understand what this means for the future of China.

programme.title: Wild China
programme.desc: The extreme landscapes north of the Great Wall have shaped some of China's most colourful people and wildlife. From nomadic tribes hunting with eagles, to camel trains crossing the Silk Road, from frozen Siberian wastes to baking deserts of Central Asia, life in northern China is always on the edge.

programme.title: Wild China
programme.desc: Ancient tea-growing cultures, traditional seaweed-thatched villages, bird-filled wetlands, rare white dolphins, snake-infested islands and futuristic cities jostle along China's fertile eastern seaboard. The seaboard marks the front-line in the scramble for resources and space between 700 million people and a surprising wealth of wildlife.

programme.title: Wild Scandinavia
programme.desc: Exploring Scandinavia's wild and unpredictable coast, beginning around the Swedish Baltic Sea which includes fjords home to eagles, otters, base jumpers and orcas.

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: Mike and Alison welcome the very first guests to their new bijoux B&B, determined to get a glowing review, whatever the cost. While serving the couple breakfast, Alison realises that they are not enjoying their anniversary break and, fearing a bad review, utilises the surprising skills of Lady Button and Julian to ensure the couple make the most of their weekend away. Mary reveals she has never had a holiday, so Pat tells her about the joys and pitfalls of week on the Costa Del Sol.

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Why has Deborah agreed to spend the night with Tony? Why has Gary painted Dorothy's record green? And who was it that died in the tragic canoeing accident?

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses...
programme.desc: Rodney's in love with Debbie from the newsagents, but problem is she's only 19, and about 19 years ago Del was seeing her mum.

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses...
programme.desc: Rodney needs a girlfriend to accompany him to a do in order to win a bet, so Del steps in, hoping that there's a tidy profit in store for him.

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses...
programme.desc: With the Trotters low on cash, Uncle Albert attempts to come to their rescue. When he falls through a pub cellar door, they attempt to sue for damages. Unfortunately, Uncle Albert's pulled this stunt a few times.

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses...
programme.desc: Del and Rodney attend Grandad's funeral, where they become suspicious of a certain long-lost seafaring relative - Uncle Albert of course.

programme.desc: Del persuades Denzil to lend him his redundancy money, but ends up chasing a rare butterfly.

programme.desc: Granville takes delivery of a bargain consignment from Spain. Eric and Cyril fall out over a lost compass and Mr Newbold falls in and gets soaked on a boat trip with Mrs Rossi.

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: G-G-Granville can't believe his luck when the milkwoman makes a pass at him. All he has to do now is persuade Arkwright to spend the night away from the shop.

programme.sub-title: Fig Biscuits and Inspirational Toilet Rolls

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: Geraldine presents a Brain of Dibley competition, and Owen offers to give a running commentary whilst gelding horses. Meanwhile, Alice is desperate to impress her future father-in-law.

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: Geraldine turns Cupid, when she brings Alice and Hugo together - and then receives a marriage proposal from a most unexpected source.

programme.title: Mrs Brown's Boys
programme.desc: With his wedding only days away and tensions running high, Dermot suffers some pre-wedding jitters and takes refuge in a cupboard. programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: Mike and Alison welcome the very first guests to their new bijoux B&B, determined to get a glowing review, whatever the cost. While serving the couple breakfast, Alison realises that they are not enjoying their anniversary break and, fearing a bad review, utilises the surprising skills of Lady Button and Julian to ensure the couple make the most of their weekend away. Mary reveals she has never had a holiday, so Pat tells her about the joys and pitfalls of week on the Costa Del Sol.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: A missing person case from the past comes back to haunt Grace when she's called to a brothel, where a woman is holding a man hostage.

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: DCs Jacob Banks and Mickey Webb investigate the disappearance of teenager Saskia, whose father Eamonn is due to be released from prison having served a sentence for murder. Visiting Eamonn in prison, the detectives learn that Saskia has a boyfriend, and that he is the son of the man Eamonn killed. Enlisting the help of the boy's bitter mother, both uniformed officers and CID detectives race to find the boyfriend.

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: DCs Webb and Banks investigate when the body of a young man is fished from the Thames. The dead man is identified as Jake Evans, and the detectives discover that he had been volunteering at a homeless shelter. After Webb spends a night on the street befriending some of the homeless people Jake knew, the officers realise that the community is living in fear of someone who may have have had a hand in Jake's murder - but who?

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: After a night on the streets, Mickey is rescued from a kicking by Nicola McKenzie, a homeless girl. Meanwhile, Max and Banksy learn that the mysterious Greg is Greg Simm, a fraudster who terrifies the homeless community. When an elderly man is found dead in an alleyway, is Greg behind it? Evidence begins to point to Nicola and Mickey is told that she is now the prime suspect and he has to bring her in.

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Sergeant Stone and DC Mickey Webb investigate an incident between Trevor Berwick and Dr Josh Thomas, whom Trevor believed was having an affair with his wife Penny. Mickey takes a soft approach in questioning Trevor, whom he senses is somewhat unstable, but Stone is brutal about how he thinks the man should have handled himself.

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: When 16-year-old Janine Clark claims she was raped by her boyfriend Mark Watts and three of his friends, the team must try to work out who is telling the truth. The case is further complicated by the accusations of the various parents. Janine tells Terry that her boyfriend forced her into having sex with the others while it was filmed on a mobile phone. The boys are arrested and Jo is determined to get a confession.

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: DC Jo Masters believes that a man who broke into a couple's flat is a stalker, but must find proof to back up her suspicions. Jeremy Preston is apprehended by Josh Hunt at the flat Josh shares with Ami Ryan, but Jeremy claims under police questioning that he and Ami are having an affair. After Ami says that she does not know Jeremy, Jo discovers that the two work at the same place, opening up new doors in the investigation.

programme.title: 999: NHS Rescue Squad
programme.desc: Paramedic Rochers fights to save a DIY mechanic crushed by his own car.

programme.title: 999: Rescue Squad
programme.desc: The team try to seal a major chemical spill and help a teenager who fell down a chimney.

programme.title: 999: Rescue Squad
programme.desc: In this edition the team race to save a man who has been shot outside a mosque.

programme.title: 999: Rescue Squad
programme.desc: The medics are called to support a bomb squad, and help a teenager impaled on a gate.

programme.title: 999: Rescue Squad
programme.desc: There is a suspected acid attack on the streets of Bradford.

programme.title: 999: Rescue Squad
programme.desc: One final shift with Yorkshire Ambulance Service's Hazardous Area Response Team. A police chase ends with a spectacular crash and five trapped teens in the wreckage.

programme.title: First Responders
programme.desc: A severe collision involving two vehicles results in two men suffering life-threatening injuries; a 12-year-old child is seriously hurt after an accident while riding a dirt bike on a remote farm; a tourist experiences a thrilling adventure.

programme.title: First Responders
programme.desc: A motorcyclist suffers a horrible injury; a husband performs life-saving CPR; a concussed mountain biker is found dazed and confused; the Police have some VIP passengers.

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: Alison and Mike are trying to find a semi-harmonious routine with the ghostly housemates of Button House. The ghosts have found a way to make their new situation work for them, while the couple are working towards a new money-making venture to fund their perpetual renovations. Without the money to continue the extensive building work, and with the hotel still a distant dream, Alison and Mike decide to try to rent the place out for events.

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: After a heavy night partying, Alison and Mike wake to find their house in disarray. With the clock ticking until a potentially crucial business partner comes to view the venue, and with very sore heads, the couple attempt a mass clean up. The ghosts are all acting very strangely, and Alison struggles to piece together the events of the night before to figure out what happened to them, whilst she's tasked with finding something precious to Lady Button before she realises it's missing.

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: Alison and Mike grapple with the latest obstacle to nailing down an event booking, but they're stymied by the Captain's past coming back to haunt him.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance

programme.desc: An 18-week-old cockapoo puppy Henry has a fractured neck following a freak garden accident. Professor Noel Fitzpatrick is forced to perform a risky, and truly inventive, procedure to realign the fracture in an attempt to save his life.

programme.desc: Simon Reeve travels across Indonesia where he encounters paradise islands undiscovered by tourists and an environment under threat. In Sumatra and Borneo he meets orang-utans and gets adopted by headhunters. His journey ends on the island of Sulawesi, where he takes to the water with the Bajo sea gypsies.

programme.title: Equator
programme.desc: In the Galapagos Islands, Simon Reeve meets some of the most beautiful and unique wildlife on the planet. He climbs an active volcano in Ecuador, journeys across war-torn Colombia, meets an Indian tribe that have their own monument to the Equator and ends up in Brazil where he travels through the rainforest.

programme.desc: An extension is now underway to get people into the centre of Australia's biggest city, including a new tunnel crossing deep under Sydney Harbour.

programme.title: Mega Metro
programme.desc: As Australia's largest transport project gets underway, we go back under Sydney Harbour to check out history in the making as the construction of the twin metro rail tunnels continues deep under the surface.

programme.title: Great Indian Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Guided by his Bradshaw's 1913 Handbook of Indian, Foreign and Colonial Travel, Michael Portillo embarks on a classic rail journey from Amritsar to Shimla. Along the way he helps to feed the thousands at the world's largest free kitchen and travels the railway routes used by millions of migrants during Partition. He gives his trademark colourful wardrobe an Indian twist.

programme.title: Great Indian Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael embarks on a rail journey from the Thar Desert in Rajasthan to the Indian capital, taking in desert landscapes and dazzling historic palaces. From Jodhpur, Michael strikes out into the desert, taking a camel ride to a village where life has changed little in centuries, before embarking on the Jaipur-Agra-Delhi `Golden Triangle' tour, India's must-do itinerary in 1913 as today.

programme.title: Great Indian Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo's `Bradshaw's 1913 Handbook of Indian, Foreign and Colonial Travel' leads him on a railway journey through the modern south Indian states of Karnataka and Tamil Nadu, from the former princely state of Mysore to the first stronghold of the East India Company in Chennai,formerly Madras.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: As Robbie leaves the scenic Llangollen Canal, he faces a journey of running repairs and narrowboat maintenance on the old Naughty Lass.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: With the Anderton Boat Lift out of action, Robbie explores the scenic River Weaver onboard a borrowed narrowboat called 'Tench'.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: S6/Ep2 - Robbie navigates the Oxford Canal, bumps into a hire boat and a hedge and tackles large river locks on the scenic Upper River Thames.

programme.title: Sacred Rivers with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Starting his journey at the first bend in the Yangtze, Simon follows the river to Dazu where he sees 50,000 ancient and exquisite rock carvings, some of the only religious artefacts not to have been destroyed under communist rule.

programme.title: Cornwall with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon journeys through some of the most beautiful coastal locations Britain has to offer and meets the incredible Cornish characters who make the county unique.

programme.title: Cornwall with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon investigates the environmental challenges facing Cornwall and the rest of the country, and on the way encounters some of its iconic wildlife, including Britain's largest predator, the huge grey seal.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie returns to where his boating life began, exploring London's canals on Naughty Lass. He travels through Little Venice and moors in Paddington Basin.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: As a teenager, all Dave wanted for his first car was a 2 litre Ghia Cortina, and today he's off to Nottinghamshire to collect just that, alongside a Mark 1 Capri.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Paul and daughter Kate collect a Series 1 Land Rover, while Jack collects an unusual wartime paratrooper's bike in Scarborough.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The guys are drawn by the curves of a stunning 1999 Morgan with an incredible 4.6 V8 engine, but things aren't as good as they seem when they get to the garage.

programme.title: I Am Ali
programme.desc: Muhammad Ali's own audio journals, friends, family and fellow boxers provide insight into the extraordinary life and legendary career of the pugilist.

programme.desc: Terry has a golden rule: `Do unto others as they would do unto you - but do it first'. This serves him well when he gets into a fight with a local hard man Dougie Scaife.

programme.title: Villages by the Sea
programme.desc: Archaeologist Ben Robinson visits a small village in Northumberland to find out how the family and village who both share the name Craster have had their lives and fortunes intertwined for over 800 years. The village sits on a unique seam of rock called the Whin Sill and next to the North Sea.
